title: Finding Subgame Perfect Equilibria via Backward Induction
description: A flowchart illustrating the backward induction process for solving finite horizon sequential games to find Subgame Perfect Nash Equilibria (SPNE).
elements: Solve the last stage subgames for Nash Equilibria (NE)
Replace solved subgames with their NE payoffs
Move to the previous decision node (back one stage)
End: Full SPNE strategy profile identified
relationships: Process flows sequentially from top to bottom, moving backwards through the game tree
A 'No' decision loops back to continue solving the previous stage
The final 'Yes' decision concludes the process
